title: Warm Spanish Porcini Cocido-Madrileno
description: A hearty, grassy Spanish dish featuring porcini mushrooms in a rich, smoky broth. A Basque classic, suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Add the mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the broth, smoked paprika, bay leaves, and thyme to the saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Preheat a sous vide machine to 180	0F. Divide the soup among 4-6 ramekins or small oven-safe bowls. Place the ramekins in the sous vide machine and cook for 1 hour.
Remove the ramekins from the sous vide machine and serve the soup hot, garnished with extra thyme if desired.
